title: Sporeling Emerges

phase_1_default.description: One transparent PNG scene cutout depicting Sporeling emerging in front of the split mound.

characters.role: newly emerged character standing in front of the split mound

advanced_legacy_strips: Use art-pipeline/layer-rules/ and add scene-local strip files only when four-strip output is explicitly requested.
notes: Phase 1 scene prompt generated from story.md and characters/sporeling. Daily output is output/prompts/scene.txt -> output/images/scene.png. Preserve Sporeling identity exactly from reusable character files.
